rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" is canonical writing-polish language; the load-bearing responsibility is sentence- and paragraph-level prose quality — tightening redundancy, improving flow, and removing hedged or contradictory phrasing (e.g., the final paragraph simultaneously claims the calibration breaks and that the framework automatically handles the break, which is a prose-level incoherence that editing must resolve).
